mapper.select: SELECT a.*, st.name AS student_name, cl.name AS class_name, co.name AS course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student st ON a.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON a.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN course co ON a.course_id = co.id ORDER BY a.id

SELECT a.*, st.name AS student_name, cl.name AS class_name, co.name AS course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student st ON a.student_id = st.id LEFT JOIN clazz cl ON a.class_id = cl.id LEFT JOIN course co ON a.course_id = co.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (student_id, class_id, course_id, attend_date, status, remark, recorder_id) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{classId}, #{courseId}, #{attendDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{recorderId})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET student_id=#{studentId}, class_id=#{classId}, course_id=#{courseId}, attend_date=#{attendDate}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, recorder_id=#{recorderId} WHERE id = #{id}
